subcodes.first_line: The world hath been created and nations brought forth from the realm of nothingness into being, that perchance they might discover the cause and purpose of their own creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم خلق شد و امم از عرصه عدم بوجود آمد که شاید سبب و علت هستی و خلق خود را بیابند
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
